debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] GT_MenuRegistration cue fired!'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Initialized missing DefensiveEquipment settings'
'[GalaxyTrader] Global settings menu registered with Simple Menu API'

signal_cue_instantly.param: table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if $useVanillaXPOnly then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if $useVanillaXPOnly then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$XP', '$UseVanillaXPOnly', $useVanillaXPOnly] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$AutoTraining then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$AutoTraining then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$XP', '$AutoTraining', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$AutoTraining] ]

do_if.value: not $profitBaseRaw? or $profitBaseRaw == null or $profitBaseRaw lt 0 or $profitBaseRaw gt 50000

debug_text.text: '[GT-Settings] WARNING: Invalid Trading.MinAbsoluteProfit base, reset to 100Cr (10000 RAW)'

signal_cue_instantly.param: table[ $col = 1, $colSpan = 4, $text = {77000,9025}, $mouseOverText = 'Minimum player money required before ships search for trades. Range: 1,000 - 100,000 Cr.' ]

do_if.value: not $minPlayerMoney? or $minPlayerMoney == null or $minPlayerMoney lt 1000 or $minPlayerMoney gt 100000

signal_cue_instantly.param: table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Fleet.$EnableFleetCoordination then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Fleet.$EnableFleetCoordination then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$Fleet', '$EnableFleetCoordination', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Fleet.$EnableFleetCoordination] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ThreatAvoidance', '$Enabled', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$UseDynamicBlacklist then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$UseDynamicBlacklist then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ThreatAvoidance', '$UseDynamicBlacklist', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$UseDynamicBlacklist] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$BlockEnemyFactions then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$BlockEnemyFactions then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ThreatAvoidance', '$BlockEnemyFactions', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$BlockEnemyFactions] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$AutoRepair.$Enabled then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$AutoRepair.$Enabled then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$AutoRepair', '$Enabled', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$AutoRepair.$Enabled] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$LevelUp then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$LevelUp then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $echo = table[$section = '$Notifications', $setting = '$LevelUp', $current = global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$LevelUp] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$TrainingRequired then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$TrainingRequired then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $echo = table[$section = '$Notifications', $setting = '$TrainingRequired', $current = global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$TrainingRequired] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$TrainingCompleted then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$TrainingCompleted then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $echo = table[$section = '$Notifications', $setting = '$TrainingCompleted', $current = global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$TrainingCompleted] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$ProfitReports then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$ProfitReports then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $echo = table[$section = '$Notifications', $setting = '$ProfitReports', $current = global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$ProfitReports] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$MarketAlerts then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$MarketAlerts then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $echo = table[$section = '$Notifications', $setting = '$MarketAlerts', $current = global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$MarketAlerts] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$FleetUpdates then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$FleetUpdates then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Config_Setting_Toggle, $echo = table[$section = '$Notifications', $setting = '$FleetUpdates', $current = global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$FleetUpdates] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$Modifications', '$Enabled', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$Enabled then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$Enabled then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$DefensiveEquipment', '$Enabled', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$Enabled] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockCountermeasures then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockCountermeasures then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$DefensiveEquipment', '$RestockCountermeasures', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockCountermeasures] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockDefenseDrones then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockDefenseDrones then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$DefensiveEquipment', '$RestockDefenseDrones', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockDefenseDrones] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockTradeDrones then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockTradeDrones then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$DefensiveEquipment', '$RestockTradeDrones', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockTradeDrones] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockLaserTowers then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockLaserTowers then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$DefensiveEquipment', '$RestockLaserTowers', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockLaserTowers] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockRepairDrones then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockRepairDrones then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$DefensiveEquipment', '$RestockRepairDrones', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$DefensiveEquipment.$RestockRepairDrones] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$Enabled then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$Enabled then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$Enabled', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$Enabled] ]
table[ $col = 1, $colSpan = 6, $text = 'Pilot renaming (GT)', $mouseOverText = 'Toggle GT pilot tags: (T:Level) PilotName' ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$PilotRenamingEnabled then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$PilotRenamingEnabled then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$PilotRenamingEnabled', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$PilotRenamingEnabled] ]

table[ $col = 5, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayXP then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayXP then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$DisplayXP', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayXP] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$XPPosition == 'prefix' then {77000,9076} else {77000,9077}, $color = 'Color.text_normal', $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$XPPosition', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$XPPosition] ]

table[ $col = 5, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayRank then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayRank then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$DisplayRank', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayRank] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$RankPosition == 'prefix' then {77000,9076} else {77000,9077}, $color = 'Color.text_normal', $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$RankPosition', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$RankPosition] ]

table[ $col = 5, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayLevel then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayLevel then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$DisplayLevel', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayLevel] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$LevelPosition == 'prefix' then {77000,9076} else {77000,9077}, $color = 'Color.text_normal', $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$LevelPosition', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$LevelPosition] ]

table[ $col = 5, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayShipClass then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayShipClass then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$DisplayShipClass', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayShipClass] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$ShipClassPosition == 'prefix' then {77000,9076} else {77000,9077}, $color = 'Color.text_normal', $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$ShipClassPosition', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$ShipClassPosition] ]

table[ $col = 5, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayStatus then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayStatus then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$DisplayStatus', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DisplayStatus] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$StatusPosition == 'prefix' then {77000,9076} else {77000,9077}, $color = 'Color.text_normal', $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Position_Toggle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$StatusPosition', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$StatusPosition] ]

table[ $col = 5, $colSpan = 4, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DefaultNameSource == 'macro.name' then {77000,9079} else if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DefaultNameSource == 'typename' then {77000,9080} else if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DefaultNameSource == 'macro.name.base' then {77000,9081} else {77000,9083}, $color = 'Color.text_normal', $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_NameSource_Cycle, $onRightClick = GT_NameSource_Cycle, $echo = ['$ShipNaming', '$DefaultNameSource', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$DefaultNameSource] ]

table[ $col = 1, $colSpan = 4, $text = 'AI Yield Interval', $mouseOverText = 'CPU yield between heavy loop iterations in AI scripts (ms). Higher values reduce CPU load but slow down trade searches. Default: 1ms. Increase to 5-10ms on weaker systems.' ]

table[ $col = 1, $colSpan = 4, $text = 'Cache Write Batch Size', $mouseOverText = 'Number of sorted insertions between CPU yields during cache writing (1-20). Higher = faster cache updates but slightly higher per-frame CPU cost. Default: 1. Increase to 5-10 on powerful systems.' ]

table[ $col = 1, $colSpan = 4, $text = 'Cache Cleanup Batch Size', $mouseOverText = 'Number of cache entries processed between CPU yields during write-time cleanup (10-200). Higher = faster cleanup but slightly higher per-frame CPU cost. Default: 50.' ]

table[ $col = 5, $colSpan = 4, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$NumberFormat.$Format == 'german' then {77000,9244} else {77000,9245}, $color = 'Color.text_normal', $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Format_Cycle, $onRightClick = GT_Format_Cycle, $echo = ['$NumberFormat', '$Format', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$NumberFormat.$Format] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$NumberFormat.$UseMSuffix then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$NumberFormat.$UseMSuffix then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$NumberFormat', '$UseMSuffix', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$NumberFormat.$UseMSuffix] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$UI.$UseGTCreditsDueOverride then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$UI.$UseGTCreditsDueOverride then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$UI', '$UseGTCreditsDueOverride', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$UI.$UseGTCreditsDueOverride] ]

table[ $col = 7, $colSpan = 2, $text = table[ $text = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging then {1001,4825} else {1001,8942}, $color = if global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging then $TextGreen else $TextRed, $halign = 'center' ], $onClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $onRightClick = GT_Setting_Toggle, $echo = ['$Debug', '$EnableDebugLogging', global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging] ]
table[ $col = 1, $colSpan = 6, $text = 'Clear pilot renaming', $mouseOverText = 'Restore all GT pilot names to their stored vanilla names' ]
table[ $col = 1, $colSpan = 6, $text = 'Fallback activations', $mouseOverText = 'Dump global.$GT_FallbackActivations counters to notification + log' ]

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] ToggleSetting called with event.param: ' + event.param
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Extracted parameters - Section: ' + $section + ', Setting: ' + $setting + ', CurrentValue: ' + $currentValue
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Global setting toggled: ' + $section + '.' + $setting + ' = ' + global.$GT_GlobalSettings.{$section}.{$setting}
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] TogglePosition called with event.param: ' + event.param
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Extracted parameters - Section: ' + $section + ', Setting: ' + $setting + ', CurrentValue: ' + $currentValue
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Position setting toggled: ' + $section + '.' + $setting + ' = ' + global.$GT_GlobalSettings.{$section}.{$setting}

set_value.name: $section
set_value.exact: if event.param.$echo? and event.param.$echo.$section? then event.param.$echo.$section else null

set_value.name: $setting
set_value.exact: if event.param.$echo? and event.param.$echo.$setting? then event.param.$echo.$setting else null

set_value.name: $currentValue
set_value.exact: if event.param.$echo? and event.param.$echo.$current? then event.param.$echo.$current else false

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Config setting toggled: GT_Config.' + $section + '.' + $setting + ' = ' + global.$GT_Config.{$section}.{$setting}
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ProfileCycle called with event.param: ' + event.param
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Extracted parameters - Section: ' + $section + ', Setting: ' + $setting + ', CurrentValue: ' + $currentValue
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Profile cycled: ' + $section + '.' + $setting + ' = ' + $newValue + ' (' + $profileName + ')'
'[GT-Settings] Clear Trade Cache button clicked'
'[GT-Settings] Trade cache cleared for ' + $clearedCount + ' home sector(s)'

show_notification.text: '[GT] Cache dump requested. Output goes to DebugLog. Click again to cancel.'

do_if.value: not global.$GT_GlobalSettings? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging

show_notification.text: '[GT] Note: Debug Logging is OFF. Dump will still run (explicit) and write to log.'
'[GT] Cache dump: cancel requested (will stop shortly).'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Cache-Dump] CANCEL requested'

do_if.value: global.$GT_TradeCacheHomes? and global.$GT_TradeCacheHomes != null and typeof global.$GT_TradeCacheHomes == datatype.list and global.$GT_TradeCacheHomes.count gt 0

set_value.name: global.$GT_CacheDumpState
set_value.exact: table[ $Active = true, $Cancel = false, $StartedAt = player.age, $LegacyList = $isLegacyList, $HomeKeys = $homeKeys, $HomeIndex = 1, $EntryIndex = 1, $Total = $total, $Lines = 0, $CurrentHomeHeaderPrinted = false, $DockShip = if global.$GT_LastTradeRequestShip? and global.$GT_LastTradeRequestShip.exists then global.$GT_LastTradeRequestShip else null ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-Cache-Dump] BEGIN t=' + (player.age / 1) + 's total=' + $total + ' legacyList=' + $isLegacyList + ' homeKeys=' + $homeKeys.count

do_if.value: not global.$GT_CacheDumpState? or not global.$GT_CacheDumpState.$Active? or not global.$GT_CacheDumpState.$Active

debug_text.text: '[GT-Cache-Dump] CANCELLED after lines=' + global.$GT_CacheDumpState.$Lines
'[GT-Cache-Dump] HOME [GT_TradeCache legacy list] entries=' + $sectorCache.count
'[GT-Cache-Dump] HOME ' + $homeName + ' entries=' + $sectorCache.count

do_if.value: $dockShip? and $dockShip != null and $dockShip.exists and $buyOffer != null and $sellOffer != null

debug_text.text: '[GT-Cache-Dump] ' + ($i / 1) + ' ware=' + $wareName + ' amount=' + $amount + ' buyP=' + ($buyPriceRaw / 100) + 'Cr' + ' sellP=' + ($sellPriceRaw / 100) + 'Cr' + ' roi=' + ($roi / 1) + '%' + ' profit=' + ($profit / 100) + 'Cr' + ' score=' + $score + ' dist=' + $dist + ' age=' + $age + 's' + ' fail=' + $failCount + ' failedShips=' + $failedShipsCount + ' dock=' + (if $buyDockOk? then $buyDockOk else 'n/a') + '/' + (if $sellDockOk? then $sellDockOk else 'n/a') + ' buy=' + $buyName + ' sell=' + $sellName
'[GT-Cache-Dump] END lines=' + global.$GT_CacheDumpState.$Lines + ' durationMs=' + ($dur / 1ms)
'[GT-Settings] Release All Locks button clicked'
'[GT-Settings] Release All Locks complete: released=' + $released
'[GT-Settings] Clear Reservations: removed ' + $cleared + ' fleet trade reservations'

set_value.name: $cacheQueue
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheQueue? then global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheQueue.count else 0

set_value.name: $liveQueue
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveQueued? then global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveQueued.keys.count else 0

set_value.name: $workQueue
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Scheduler? and global.$GT_Scheduler.$WorkQueue? then global.$GT_Scheduler.$WorkQueue.count else 0

set_value.name: $activeWork
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Scheduler? and global.$GT_Scheduler.$ActiveWork? then global.$GT_Scheduler.$ActiveWork.keys.count else 0

do_if.value: global.$GT_TradeCacheHomes? and global.$GT_TradeCacheHomes != null and typeof global.$GT_TradeCacheHomes == datatype.list and global.$GT_TradeCacheHomes.count gt 0

set_value.name: $st
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_RequestStatus.{$ship}? and global.$GT_RequestStatus.{$ship}.$Stage? then global.$GT_RequestStatus.{$ship}.$Stage else 'unknown'

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] PriceRangeUpdate called with event.param: ' + event.param
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Price range percentage value: ' + $percentageValue + '%'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Echo data - Section: ' + $section + ', Setting: ' + $setting
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Price range updated: GT_Config.$Trading.' + $setting + ' = ' + $normalizedValue + ' (' + $percentageValue + '%)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ERROR: Missing required parameters for price range update'
'[GT-Settings] Updated GT_Config.$Trading.$MinAbsoluteProfit base = ' + $clamped + ' Cr (' + $raw + ' RAW)'
'[GT-Settings] Clear Pilot Renaming: restored=' + $restoredCount + ' processed=' + $pilotsProcessed
'[GT-Settings] Apply Pilot Renaming: updated=' + $updatedCount + ' processed=' + $pilotsProcessed
'[GT-Settings] Reset Profit Statistics button clicked - triggering migration'
'[GT-Settings] Clear All Blacklisted Sectors button clicked'
'[GT-Settings] Cleared ' + $sectorCount + ' blacklisted sectors from threat intelligence'
'[GT-Settings] Sent empty blacklist to Lua to clear all sectors'
'[GT-Settings] Reset All Settings to Defaults button clicked'
'[GT-Settings] All global settings reset to defaults'
'[GT-Settings] Trading price range defaults re-applied after Refresh_Menu'
'[GT-Blacklist] Manual blacklist recreation requested via menu button'
'[GT-Blacklist] Current stored ID: ' + $oldID + ' (will attempt to recreate)'
'[GT-Blacklist] No stored ID found - will create fresh blacklist'
'[GT-Blacklist] Recreate: BlockEnemyFactions setting: ' + $blockEnemyFactions
'[GT-Blacklist] Recreate: Enemy faction blocking ENABLED (X4 relation field = "enemy")'
'[GT-Blacklist] Recreate: Enemy faction blocking DISABLED (X4 relation field = "")'
'[GT-Blacklist] Blacklist recreation triggered - StoreBlacklistID cue will update ID when Lua responds'
'[GT-Blacklist] Reloading existing threat data into recreated blacklist'

show_notification.text: 'Assigned dynamic blacklist to GT fleet commanders'

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] UpdateSliderValue called with event.param: ' + event.param
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Slider new value: ' + $newValue
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Echo data - Section: ' + $section + ', Setting: ' + $setting
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Global setting updated: ' + $cleanSection + '.' + $cleanSetting + ' = ' + $newValue
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Search semaphore cache MaxConcurrent updated to: ' + $newValue
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Search semaphore live MaxConcurrent updated to: ' + $newValue
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ERROR: Missing required parameters - Value: ' + $newValue + ', Section: ' + $section + ', Setting: ' + $setting
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] UpdateRelationThreshold called with event.param: ' + event.param
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Relation threshold percentage value: ' + $percentageValue + '%'

do_if.value: $percentageValue? and $percentageValue != null and $section? and $section != null and $setting? and $setting != null

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Relation threshold updated: ' + $section + '.' + $setting + ' = ' + $normalizedValue + ' (' + $percentageValue + '%)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ERROR: Missing required parameters for relation threshold update'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] GT_StateAbbreviation_Update called with event.param: ' + event.param
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] State abbreviation updated: ' + $state + ' (' + $setting + ') = ' + $cleanText
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] State abbreviation reset to default: ' + $state + ' (' + $setting + ') = ' + $defaultAbbr
